title: Great Learning Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Great Learning Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Great Learning Digital Technologies in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Great Learning Digital Technologies:
Great Learning Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning Digital Technologies!
